subject.description: The subject or topic of the PDF document

author.description: The name of the person or entity that authored the document

title.description: The title of the PDF document

producer.description: The software or application used to convert the document into a PDF

creator.description: The original application used to create the document before it was converted to PDF

creationDate.description: The date and time the PDF was originally created

modificationDate.description: The date and time the PDF was last modified

pagesCount.description: The total number of pages in the PDF document

keywords.description: A list of keywords associated with the PDF document

summary.description: A generated or extracted summary of the PDF's content
